name: history-worker
description: RETIRED (Story 79) — was a MongoDB Change-Stream consumer (chad.cp_items -> chad.cp_history/cp_history_state, Story 74/78). cp_history is now written transactionally by packages/dba's executeCpMutationWithHistory instead. index.mjs is kept only as a safe no-op stub — see its own header comment and ai-docs/history/how-it-works.md.
